prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a fashionable young adult woman standing outdoors in bright natural sunlight near the entrance of a modern building. She has long, smooth warm chestnut brown hair with soft layers and a side part, falling over her shoulders and catching rim light. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque rectangular privacy block in a muted beige-brown skin-tone gradient, covering the full facial area from forehead to chin while leaving hair, neck, and body visible. She wears an elegant ivory cream sheer long-sleeve blouse with a soft draped necktie detail, tucked into a high-waisted light beige tweed skirt. Add a delicate small gold necklace at the collarbone. Her right hand gently holds a lock of hair near her shoulder, and a beige handbag with a thin gold chain strap hangs from her right shoulder at the lower right edge of the frame. The composition is a waist-up three-quarter portrait, subject centered slightly right, with a softly blurred urban background showing pale stone columns, glass doors, gray pavement, and greenery in the left background. Use realistic photography, shallow depth of field, high-resolution detail, warm midday sunlight, soft highlights on hair and blouse, refined feminine styling, natural candid pose, clean modern Japanese fashion magazine aesthetic.
